---
name: "🚀 Feature Request"
about: Suggest a new idea or improvement for the project.
title: "[FEAT] <Feature Name>"
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

## 📝 Description
A clear and concise description of what the feature is.

## 💡 Motivation / Use Case
- Why is this feature needed? 
- What problem does it solve for the user?

## 🛠 Proposed Implementation
A brief technical overview or checklist for the implementation.

- [ ] **Logic:** (How will it work in the background?)
- [ ] **UI/UX:** (How will it look in SwiftUI?)
- [ ] **Config:** (What settings need to be saved?)

## 🎨 Visual / UI Ideas
- Describe the visual style, SF Symbols, or animations.

## 📌 Additional Context
Add any other context, screenshots, or inspiration links here.
